3427.title: Ultimate 90s Playlist!
3427.description: Nothing but the best tracks and ultimate anthems from the 90s.

3428.title: Mmm Bop! Perfect 90s Pop
3428.description: We're bringing you the perfect pop playlist from the 90s.

3429.title: Saved By The 90s!
3429.description: If you need a bit of a break from modern pop, then look no further! The 90s are here to save us, so enjoy these giant hits from a golden decade of music.

3430.title: Girl Power Hour!
3430.description: It's all about girl power! Tune in for all the biggest girl power hits from the 90s.

3431.title: Never Forget The 90s!
3431.description: With so many legendary artists and so much great music being produced, how could anyone forget the nineties? Well just in case you have, here is a reminder of what made that decade so great.
